title: Revamped Trades
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/HQdBdke.png)
[![](https://i.imgur.com/hMz3BbZ.png)](https://www.reddit.com/user/RevampedPiles) [![](https://i.imgur.com/dr3uCGE.png)](https://ko-fi.com/therevamper) ![](https://i.imgur.com/fwi53HY.png) With _Revamped Trades_, we're slashing those outrageous trade costs and bringing a new level of balance to your trading experience. No more wasting your precious Emeralds on overpriced goods! I introduce to you : _Emerald Coins_, a fresh and valuable currency that makes trading fairer and more rewarding. Trade in food and other resources for Emerald Coins and enjoy significantly reduced prices across the board. _Revamped Trades_ ensures that you get more value for your trades, making your Minecraft economy both exciting and accessible. Experience a better way to trade with _Revamped Trades_! ![](https://i.imgur.com/mYGyEqv.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/fwi53HY.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/ALGtZ03.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/fwi53HY.png) **Important notice** **Revamped Trades** is the sole property of [TheRevamper](https://modrinth.com/user/TheRevamper) and is exclusively available on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/).
**Reposting or re-uploading the mod files on any other website is strictly prohibited.**
_Please report any instances of the mod being uploaded on other platforms._ Revamped Trades is **NOT** available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com). ![](https://i.imgur.com/fwi53HY.png) [![](https://i.imgur.com/1QEhqye.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/revamped-piles)
